Who We Are

Design. Manufacturing. Interiors.

My Perfect Stitch is a Zambian design and manufacturing business operating across three verticals — Bags, Furniture, and Interior Spaces — transforming ideas into thoughtfully crafted products.

From custom-branded bags for leading corporates to bespoke furniture collections and commercial interior fit-outs, we deliver work that is culturally grounded, functional, and built to perform.

25+ Corporate Clients
8+ Years Experience
3 Service Verticals

Our Brand Story

"My Perfect Stitch was born from curiosity, craft, and conviction."

What began as a personal journey into design evolved into a clear belief that design is not just about aesthetics — but about impact. As a self-taught seamstress entering the industry, I saw firsthand the gaps in quality, consistency, and functionality.

In a growing market like Zambia, I became driven by the idea that well-designed products and spaces can shape confidence, productivity, and how people experience everyday life.

Today, My Perfect Stitch is a multidisciplinary design and manufacturing business delivering products and spaces that are culturally grounded, functional, and built to perform.

Founder & CEO, My Perfect Stitch
